name: DANA Inc
business: Dana provides power-conveyance and energy-management solutions for on-highway vehicles, including axles, driveshafts, transmissions, sealing and thermal products, and electrification products such as motors, inverters, and controllers.
namedCustomers: Tata Motors Ltd (including Jaguar Land Rover)

exposures.sentence: From axles, driveshafts, transmissions, sealing and thermal products to electrification products including motors, inverters, controllers, e-sealing, e-thermal and digital solutions, we enable the propulsion of internal combustion engine (ICE), hybrid and electric powered vehicles by supplying nearly every major on-highway vehicle manufacturer in the world.

We use a variety of raw materials in the production of our products, including steel and products containing steel, stainless steel, forgings, castings, bearings, semiconductors, and magnets and related rare earth materials.
Dana has also embraced the use of artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) technologies to enhance both the research and development process and the products we develop.

catalysts.event: Cost reduction program targeting $325 million annualized savings through 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to deliver annualized savings of $325 through 2026.
The transaction closed on January 1, 2026, with Dana receiving initial cash proceeds of $2,664.

catalysts.event: Board approved $1,000 return of capital program
catalysts.sentence: On June 8, 2025, Dana s board of directors approved a program to provide up to a $1,000 return of capital to shareholders through common stock share repurchases and/or special dividends through the end of 2027.

catalysts.event: Board increased share repurchase program to $2,000 through 2030
catalysts.sentence: On February 11, 2026, Dana's board of directors increased and extended the share repurchase program to a total of $2,000 through the end of 2030.
On January 2, 2026, we repaid the $225 outstanding balance on the Term A Facility.

On January 7, 2026, we purchased, via a net proceeds tender offer, $138 of our November 2027 Notes, $142 of our June 2028 Notes, 141 of our July 2029 Notes ($164 as of January 7, 2026), $173 of our September 2030 Notes, 9 of our 2031 Notes ($10 as of January 7, 2026) and $152 of our February 2032 Notes at prices equal to 100.00% plus accrued and unpaid interest.
On January 8, 2026, we redeemed the remaining $262 of our November 2027 Notes and the remaining $258 of our June 2028 Notes at prices equal to 100.00% plus accrued and unpaid interest.

tamClaims.claim: Content per vehicle opportunity expected to increase up to three-fold on a dollar basis as market transitions from ICE to EV-based vehicles
tamClaims.sentence: As the market transitions from ICE vehicles to EV-based vehicles, the Company anticipates its content per vehicle opportunity will increase up to three-fold on a dollar basis.
